chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 2890 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Bakhtiar Ahmed Panhwar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. -------- Learned A.A.G. files parawise comments on behalf of respondents No.3, 5 and 10 which are taken on record and copy whereof has been supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. It is the case of the petitioner that official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioner at the behest of the private respondents. However, he submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this petition if official respondents are directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. says that no harassment whatsoever was ever caused to the Petitioner and further he will ensure that the official Respondents should not caused any harassment to the Petitioner. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents that there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioner in future. JUDGE JUDGE A.
